projectSummary: A structured recruitment initiative focused on posting job openings, conducting technical interviews, and extending offer letters to selected candidates by the end of the current month.
objectives: Publish job openings to attract candidates
Extend formal offer letters to selected candidates before month-end

tasks.name: Post job openings
tasks.sourceEvidence: HR posts job openings this week.
tasks.missingInfo: Specific job boards and target roles are not listed.
tasks.suggestedAction: Define the target roles and select the primary job boards (e.g., LinkedIn, Indeed) for posting.

tasks.name: Begin technical interviews
tasks.missingInfo: No specific interviewers or candidate shortlist defined.
tasks.suggestedAction: Assign technical interviewers and prepare the interview evaluation rubrics.

tasks.name: Send offer letters
tasks.sourceEvidence: Offer letters should be sent before month-end.
tasks.missingInfo: Approved salary bands and offer letter templates are not specified.
tasks.suggestedAction: Pre-approve compensation packages and draft standard offer letter templates to avoid delays.

risks.name: Low candidate response rate
risks.description: Fewer applications than expected may delay the interview schedule and push back the target offer date.
risks.solution: Promote openings on LinkedIn and university portals to increase reach and attract qualified applicants.

recommendations.title: Promote openings on LinkedIn and university portals
recommendations.description: Proactively share job postings on professional networks and academic job boards to maximize candidate sourcing.

missingInfoAlerts.description: The specific job roles, descriptions, and target headcount are missing from the project notes.
missingInfoAlerts.suggestedAction: Document the exact roles to be hired and their respective job descriptions immediately.

missingInfoAlerts.description: No technical team lead or specific interviewers have been assigned to conduct the evaluations.
missingInfoAlerts.suggestedAction: Designate technical interviewers and block their calendars for the upcoming Monday.
